Hero.title: Hi, I'm Michel.
Hero.desc: I build modern, fast, and well-structured landing pages and websites to strengthen your online presence and improve your visibility on search engines.

Differentials.label: Differential
Differentials.title: Why choose me?
Differentials.desc: A practical approach that combines technical quality with fast delivery.
Differentials.d0: Websites optimized for fast loading and smooth user experience.
Differentials.d1: Structure built to support proper indexing by search engines.
Differentials.d2: Designed to work perfectly across mobile, tablet, and desktop.
Differentials.d3: Clear layout and content organization to build trust.
Differentials.d4: Modern best practices ensuring stability and scalability.
Differentials.d5: Delivered ready to publish, with everything properly set up.

FAQ.label: Information
FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.q0: What is the average delivery time?
FAQ.a0: The average timeline is 5 to 10 business days after approval, depending on the project complexity.
FAQ.a1: No. I handle all the technical aspects so you receive a ready-to-use website.
FAQ.a2: Yes. The website is fully optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop devices.
FAQ.q3: Are there any mandatory monthly fees?
FAQ.a3: There are no monthly fees for development. Costs like domain and hosting may apply, but they are optional and usually affordable.
FAQ.a4: I analyze your business and create an initial website version as a demo. This way, you can see the result before making a decision. Then I apply adjustments and publish the final version.
FAQ.q5: Will I lose my current domain?
FAQ.a5: No. You can keep your existing domain and simply update the design and structure. If you don’t have one yet, I can guide you through the setup.
FAQ.a6: A professional website increases your credibility, strengthens your online presence, and makes it easier for potential customers to find and contact you.

Contact.label: Let's talk
Contact.title: Transform your digital presence today
Contact.desc: Looking for a professional website? Get in touch and I’ll show you a working proposal before you commit.
